name: Ogden factory machine accident—how much for lost future earnings?

mainEntity.name: Ogden factory machine accident—how much for lost future earnings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp partial; third-party fuller future pay[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp covers wage loss; third-party for full future if permanent.** Utah limits comp[1][4]. **Key factors:** Life expectancy, skills. **Practical guidance:** Vocational expert values; settle high.
